w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: We request you to remit, as per instruction below:
(IN THE COUNTRY WHERE FOREIGN CURRENCY BELONGS)
The final beneficiary does not belong to OFAC prohibited countries/entities located in those countries.
We have not remitted the said funds for the same purpose through other bank/sources.
We agree to the rate prevailing at the time of taking the rates.
Please remit the above amount and debit our CC
The good imported are not covered under negative list of imports in the export and import policy in force.
We undertake to submit exchange control copy of BILL OF Entry within 90 days from date of payment for Non-Capital Goods/ 3 years in case of capital goods.
No TDS is to be paid for this transaction.
In case of advance payment, physical import of goods into India will be made within six months from the date of remittance and we will furnish documentary evidence of import within fifteen days.
The remittance is made direct to the supplier. In the event of
of goods the amount of advance remittance will be repatriated to India.

We request you to effect the above mentioned remittance through Swift/mail/postal service/telegraph/ cable/otherwise entirely at our risk and responsibility and on the damage arising or resulting from delay in transmission, delivery or
of the relative message/instrument and delay in payment/nonpayment to the beneficiary concerned or for any mistake,

omission or error in transmission or delivery thereof or in de-ciphering the message for any cause whatsoever or from its mis- interpretation when received. We fully understand and realize that you will make use of one/some of your foreign offices/correspondent banks/agents or sub-agents and we shall not hold you liable or responsible in any manner for any errors, negligence, suspension or default of any of them or for any failure to identify the payee or any mis payment by any of them nor shall we hold you liable for any suspension of the means of transmission or any imposition of any censorship, exchange control or other restriction.

I/We hereby declare that the transaction(s) the details of which are specifically mentioned in the Schedule hereunder does not involve and is not designed for the purpose of any contravention of evasion of the provisions of the aforesaid Act or of any rule, regulation, notification, direction or order made there under.

I/We also hereby agree and undertake to give such information/documents, before the Bank undertakes the transaction(s) and as may be required from time to time as will reasonably satisfy you about the transaction(s) in terms of the above declaration.

I/We also understand that if I/We refuse to comply with any such requirement or make unsatisfactory compliance therewith, the Bank shall refuse in writing to undertake the transaction and shall if it has reason to believe that any contravention/evasion is contemplated by me/us report the matter to the Reserve Bank of India.
I/We further declare that the undersigned has/have the authority to give this declaration and undertaking on behalf of the firm/company.
Applicable when the declaration/undertaking is signed on behalf of the firm/company.
Amount of Foreign Exchange to be released
For office use: Details of documentary evidence verified:
FORMAT OF REMITTER’S REQUEST FOR RELEASING OF OFAC SUSPECT/ BLOCKED MESSAGES
Name & Address of the Customer: Gujarat Flotex Pvt. Ltd.
Place & Date of registration (in case of companies)
. Filtering Solution for OFAC Sanction Prog: User Manual Release 1

I/We have been informed by your branch that the message pertaining to the above transaction has been blocked for partial/ exact matching with banned entities of US OFAC. The reasons for blocking of the message have been perused and understood.

I/ we confirm that the above transaction is for genuine purpose and does not relate to any banned entity as per US OFAC guidelines/ valid license from OFAC authority has been obtained (license no.----). I hereby request you to resend the said message at my/our risk and responsibility. In case the US Treasury authority block/not releases the fund, I/we will not hold State Bank of India responsible for any loss that may be caused to us.
Subject: Undertaking-cum- Declaration for processing Import Advance

We Gujarat Flotex Private Limited, having our registered office at 301-304, ELANZA VERTEX SINDHU BHAVAN ROAD BEHIND ARMIEDA, S.G. HIGHWAY BODAKDEV, AHMEDABAD 380059 GUJARAT, INDIA, hereby request you to process the import advance payment by debit to our account number
e) Expected Date of shipments / Delivery of Services*:
2. We hereby undertake and declare that:
The transaction mentioned under this Undertaking-cum-Declaration does not contravene the provisions of the Foreign Exchange Management Act 1999 ('FEMA') and rules/regulations made thereunder.
Physical import of the goods/ procurement of services* will be completed within six months (or three years in case of capital goods) from the date of remittance.
Necessary documentary evidence of imports / procurement* will be provided within fifteen days from the close of the relevant period / completion of import.
*After import of goods, will share details of Bill of Entry (BOE)/ Courier Bill of Entry (CBE).
*After procurement / import of service, will produce a certificate from Chartered Accountant, indicating that the services have been procured / imported.

*In case of non- physical imports (i.e., software or data through internet / datacom channels and drawings and designs through e-mail / fax), will produce a certificate from Chartered Accountant and keep Customs Authorities informed on such imports.

We also hereby agree and undertake to give such information/documents as may be reasonably required by you to your satisfaction about this transaction in terms of the above declaration. It is further declared that the undersigned has/have the authority to give this Undertaking-cum-Declaration on behalf of the company as duly
Application for remittance in Foreign Currency
To be completed by authorized dealer
(For use or Reserve Bank of India)
(Name and Address of the authorized dealer)
(Name and Address of the beneficiary of the remittance)
In payment of imports into India, detailed below:
DETAILS OF GOODS IMPORTED OR TO BE IMPORTED INTO INDIA
@ Actual amount endorsed in rupees against each
involved, should be state under this column
should be furnished. If the space is inadequate, a separate statement may be attached. The amount
Country from which goods are consigned
If any, booked against the import
2. If remittance to be made is less than invoice value,

I/We hereby declare that the statements made by me/us on this form are true and that I/we have not applied for an authorization through any other bank. I/We declare and also understand that the foreign exchange to be enquired by me/us pursuant to this application shall be used by me/us only for the purpose for which it is a acquired and the conditions subject to which the exchange or remain complied with.
Note: for remittances covering intermediary trade, Form A2 should be used
DECLARATION TO BE FURNISHED BY APPLICANT
against which the remittance is sought is / are valid and has/have not been cancelled by DGFT
The goods to which this application relates
imported into India on my/our own account*
The invoice value of the goods which is declared on this Form is the real value of the
If the import has I/we attach the relative Customs-stamped Exchange control copy of Bill of Entry* Post parcel wrapper (for imports by post/
If the import has I/We undertake to produce within three months to the authorized dealer the relative Customs-stamped Exchange Control copy of Bill of
been made Entry* Post parcel wrapper (for imports by post/
@ where the import is on behalf of Central/State Government Department or a company or a company owned by Central/State Government/
Statutory corporation, Local Body, etc., the name of the Government Department, Corporation, etc. should be started
SPACE FOR COMMENTS OF THE AUTHORISED DEALER

(While forwarding the application to Reserve Bank for approval, reference to Exchange Control paragraph/A.D. Circular in terms of which the reference is made should invariably be cited. If any remittance application on account of the same import was referred to Reserve bank earlier reference to the last correspondence/approval should also be cited.
Name of Address: STATE BANK OF INDIA
CERTIFICATE TO BE FURNISHED BY AUTHORISED DEALER (IMPORTER’S BANKER)
In retirement of bills under Letter of Credit opened through us
(iii) [] against documents received through our medium for collection
on account of documents received direct by the applicant/s against undertaking furnished by the letter to submit Customs-stamped
Exchange control copy of bill of entry/Post parcel wrapper within three months.
(v) [] On account t of documents received direct by the applicant/s against Customs-stamped Exchange Control copy of Bill of Entry/Post
all the Exchange control regulations applicable to the remittance have been complied with
the payment to the supplier of the goods
(Name and address of the foreign bank)
We also certify/undertake that the relevant Customs-stamped Exchange control copy of bill of Entry or post parcel/courier wrapper
*shall be verified by us within three months (vide certificate[(a)(ii) and (iii) above]
*shall be obtained from the applicant/s within three month certified [(a) (
Name of Address: STATE BANK OF INDIA
(UNDER SECTION 10 (5), CHAPTER III OF FOREIGN EXCHANGE MANAGEMENT ACT, 1999)

I / We hereby declare that the transaction (s) details of which are specifically mentioned in the schedule hereunder does not involve and is not designed for the purpose of any contravention or evasion of the provisions of the aforesaid Act or of any Rule, Regulation, Notification, Direction or Order made there under.

I / We also hereby agree and undertake to give such information / documents, before the Bank undertakes the transactions(s) and as may be required from time to time as will reasonably satisfy you about the transaction(s) in terms of the above declaration.

I / We also understand that if I / We refuse to comply with any such requirement or make unsatisfactory compliance therewith, the Bank shall refuse in writing to undertake the transaction and shall if it has reason to believe that any contravention / evasion is contemplated by me / us report the matter to Reserve Bank of India.
*I / We further declare that the undersigned has / have the authority to give this declaration and undertaking on behalf of the firm/company
Applicable when the declaration / undertaking is signed on behalf of the firm/company
SCHEDULE DETAILING THE FOREIGN EXCHANGE TRANSACTION:
Amount of Foreign Exchange to be released
